creator: kennethsalerno@yahoo.com
text:
I have an update to this issue: when I set the CPU to POWER9 in QEMU, I get different results than I had with POWER8. Now, instead of a Data Storage Exception, I get the following message and a hang when building GENERIC64 with gcc6:

...[normal boot]...
Error initializing RTAS (-1902)
...
run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after 60 seconds for 0x5f2888


I get this same error above if I build the GENERIC64 kernel with the system gcc 4.2 and simply disable DDB_CTF, or if I copy the GENERIC64 kernel and use KERNCONF env.
